title: RESIDENTIAL SUMMER CAMP AT EVANS CREEK RETREAT - 211info
text: EASTERSEALS OREGON PORTLAND RESIDENTIAL SUMMER CAMP AT EVANS CREEK RETREAT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers yearly 4-night summer camp retreats in two sessions, one for youth and the other for adults. The camp provides an environment that emphasizes the campers' abilities and independence, as well as the development of their social skills and appreciation and knowledge of the outdoors. Activities may include swimming, dances, talent shows, sports and games, arts and crafts, outdoor experiences, and nature hikes. Provides all meals and snacks. 237 NE Broadway Street Suite 100 Portland, OR 97232 Eligibility: Ages 12 and older with a diagnosed disability Hours: Varies Email (503) 228-5100 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 228-5100 Main phone Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information. Visit website for camp and scholarship applications. FEES: $850 plus a $25 application fee; limited scholarships eligible on a first-come, first-serve basis DOCUMENTS: Application form AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: Camps * Disabilities Issues Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY GROUPS AND GOVERNMENT/ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES - EASTERSEALS OREGON EMPLOYMENT - CONNECTING COMMUNITIES PROGRAM EMPLOYMENT - HOMELESS VETERAN REINTEGRATION PROGRAM EMPLOYMENT - SENIOR COMMUNITY SERVICE EMPLOYMENT PROGRAM LEISURE ACTIVITIES/RECREATION - OREGON SUMMER DAY CAMP If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
